LAW AND MOTION 301, AFTER THE ARGUMENT, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT METALCLAD INSULATION CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF HAS RAISED A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT THROUGH THE DECLARATIONS HE SUBMITS. THE OBJECTIONS TO WHICH ARE OVERRULED, EXCEPT FOR PARAGRAPHS 12 AND 13 TO THE COHEN DECLARATION. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS GRANTED AS TO FALSE REPRESENTATION, CONTRACTOR LIABILITY AND PUNITIVE DAMAGES. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Aug-06-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
NATALIE HOLDEN, ESQ. (MCKENNA LONG & ALDRIDGE LLP, (415)267-4127, FOR DEFENDANT/MOVING PARTY, METALCLAD INSULATION CORPORATION
JEFFREY WEHR, ESQ. (BRAYTON PURCELL, LLP), (415)898-1555, FOR PLAINTIFF/OPPOSING PARTY, LAWRENCE DAVIE

THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. AFTER THE ARGUMENT, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT METALCLAD INSULATION CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF HAS RAISED A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT THROUGH THE DECLARATIONS HE SUBMITS. THE OBJECTIONS TO WHICH ARE OVERRULED, EXCEPT FOR PARAGRAPHS 12 AND 13 TO THE COHEN DECLARATION. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS GRANTED AS TO FALSE REPRESENTATION, CONTRACTOR LIABILITY AND PUNITIVE DAMAGES. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)
